name: MapR5EncounterStatusForR4
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for ValueSet R5-encounter-status-for-R4 from FHIR R5 to FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of concepts from ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-status|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-status|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-status|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-EncounterStatus-R4B-EncounterStatus` (`ConceptMap-R5-EncounterStatus-R4B-EncounterStatus.json`)
